summary: External community contributions came via pull requests: PR #447 from 1506086927 (portable mode), PR #3 from NanmiCoder (teams lifecycle), PR #1 from 1506086927 (teams state persistence), PR #27 from studyzy (docs), PR #2 from dhb52 (docs). The project also synced with upstream (cc-haha repository) indicating it is a fork.
